title: Tycoon's Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Moon that aids in emerald mining for the night.
body:
During the Tycoon's Moon event, you will find emeralds easier to mine, being granted with haste for the night and emerald drops doubled. During a Super Tycoon Moon, emerald drops will be quadrupled and you will be granted with night vision as well. Take the time to hunt for emeralds!

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
